library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים · ספריית קיימברידג'
description: Recto with continuation on verso: Legal document in Hebrew. In which the brothers Yefet, Mevorakh and Yosef, sons of the late Mawhūb b. Faraj, acknowledge receipt of their inheritance, after their oldest brother, Mufarrij, also deceased, had deposited their father’s estate with the ‘three elders’, i.e. Sahl, Yosef and Seʿadya, sons of Yisrael b. Yaʿaqov, known as the Tustarī brothers. (Information from CUDL, Gil, Palestine, doc. 329, and Goitein's attached notes.) On verso there is also a letter in Hebrew (see separate record).
description_he: שטר משפטי עברי. האחים יפת, מבורך ויוסף, בני המנוח מוהוב בן פרג', מאשרים קבלת ירושתם שהופקדה אצל אחי תוסתרי.
